case_title: ROBIN FLURY VS. MARRIOTT INTERNATIONAL, INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FLURY, ROBIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MARRIOTT INTERNATIONAL, INC./CO BETH WORKMAN PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PROVEN BY A PREPONDERANCE OF THE EVIDENCE THAT HER INJURIES WERE THE RESULT OF DEFENDANT'S CONDUCT OT MAINTENCE OF ITS PREMISES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,710.00 FILED BY FLURY, ROBIN AS TO DEFENDANT MARRIOTT INTERNATIONAL, INC./CO BETH WORKMAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-26-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER FILED BY FLURY, ROBIN MARRIOTT INTERNATIONAL, INC./CO BETH WORKMAN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-26-2009 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-11-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MARRIOTT INTERNATIONAL, INC./CO BETH WORKMAN
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT MARRIOTT INTERNATIONAL, INC./CO BETH WORKMAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-26-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-26-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
